name: phpdot/bun
description: A PHP wrapper around the Bun binary (oven-sh/bun, MIT licensed): manages a hidden Bun runtime and exposes its CLI as console commands.

suggest.phpdot/container: Autowires the #[Singleton]/#[Binds] services and the #[Config('bun')] DTO (the attributes stay inert until reflected, so standalone consumers don't need it installed).
suggest.phpdot/package: Auto-discovers bun's services and config by scanning the #[Singleton]/#[Binds]/#[Config] attributes at composer install — zero manual wiring.
suggest.phpdot/config: Populates BunConfig from config/bun.php (pinnedVersion, registryUrl, runtimeDir, workingDir) when used with phpdot/package.
suggest.ext-pcntl: Forwards SIGINT/SIGTERM to long-lived child processes (bun run dev server, build --watch) for clean shutdown.
